summary: Made two surgical seam edits: added a time bridge into the sub-collection scene so chapter 8 follows chapter 7's 'not tonight' ending cleanly, and tightened the final interior beat so Gavin's isolation points more directly toward the manuscript-driven action that opens chapter 9.
edits: Added a 'following night' time anchor at the start of the sub-collection scene to align the chapter entry with chapter 7's ending.
Adjusted the closing interior line so Gavin's last thought points toward the manuscript as his only possible next step, easing the handoff into chapter 9.
